summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed and 1 failed. VAL-LOCAL-010 failed because local-mode indexing of the standard 17-task eval subset was repeatedly killed before any benchmark repo index could be created.

assertions.title: Local search returns relevant results
assertions.reason: A faithful CLI reproduction against the standard 17-task subset (ripgrep, flask, fastify) could not complete because every `vera-local index --local` run for the copied benchmark repos was killed by the OS (exit -9), including a low-concurrency retry for flask (exit 137). With no indexes created, all searches failed with `Error: no index found`, and the captured aggregate Recall@5 was 0.0000 instead of the required >= 0.40.

commands: taskset -c 0 env HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/home OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 ORT_NUM_THREADS=1 RAYON_NUM_THREADS=1 /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local --json index --local /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/eval-corpus/flask
observations: Standard eval subset size was 17 tasks across ripgrep, flask, and fastify, matching the published benchmark subset.
Index exits: ripgrep=-9, flask=-9, fastify=-9; the constrained retry on flask exited 137 after being killed.
Because no `.vera/` index was created in the copied repos, every subsequent search failed with `Error: no index found in current directory.`
The faithful reproduction artifact `val-local-010-local-recall-report.json` records aggregate Recall@5 = 0.0000 across 17 tasks.

assertions.title: New language file indexed and searchable end-to-end
assertions.reason: API-mode indexing and search succeeded end-to-end on an isolated repo containing Ruby and C# files, and search results exposed the expected `language` and `symbol_type` metadata for the new-language symbols.

observations: Index summary: files_parsed=2, chunks_created=5, embeddings_generated=5.
`ReportBuilder` returned `lib/report_builder.rb` as the top result with `language=ruby` and `symbol_type=class`.
`RenderInvoiceSummary` returned `src/InvoiceService.cs` as the top result with `language=csharp` and `symbol_type=method`.
`stats --json` reported both indexed languages: csharp (4 chunks) and ruby (1 chunk).

assertions.title: Local mode works with new languages
assertions.reason: Local-mode indexing and search succeeded in an isolated HOME without API credentials, and the resulting JSON search hits classified Ruby and C# symbols correctly.

commands: env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local --json index --local /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/local-lang-repo

cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/local-lang-repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local --json search --local ReportBuilder

cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/local-lang-repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local --json search --local RenderInvoiceSummary

cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/local-lang-repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/cross-local-search/home /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local --json stats
observations: First local invocation downloaded the embedding model into the isolated HOME, and the first search downloaded the local reranker there as well.
Local index summary: files_parsed=2, chunks_created=5, embeddings_generated=5.
`ReportBuilder` returned `lib/report_builder.rb` with `language=ruby` and `symbol_type=class`.
`RenderInvoiceSummary` returned `src/InvoiceService.cs` with `language=csharp` and `symbol_type=method`; `stats --json` again showed both languages present.

assertions.title: Clean repo builds and tests pass
assertions.reason: All required validator commands for this milestone completed successfully from the repo root with exit code 0.

observations: `cargo test` exited 0 after running the default-feature CLI/core/eval/MCP test suites.
`cargo test --features local` exited 0 after running the local-feature test suites.
`cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `cargo clippy --features local -- -D warnings`, and `cargo fmt --check` each exited 0.
The coordinator-provided default and local release binaries were also available for CLI validation throughout this flow.

assertions.title: SKILL.md reflects all changes
assertions.reason: SKILL.md explicitly documents local mode (`--local` and `VERA_LOCAL=1`), enumerates 23 supported language entries, and the representative documented command set succeeded against the real CLI surface.

observations: SKILL.md includes `vera index --local .`, `vera search --local "parse_config"`, `vera update --local .`, and a `VERA_LOCAL=1` note.
`val-cross-104-language-list.json` parsed 23 supported language entries from the purpose section, including Ruby, C#, PHP, Haskell, Elixir, Dart, SQL, HCL/Terraform, and Protobuf.
All representative documented command families exited 0, including filtered searches, JSON output, default/local update flows, stats, and an MCP initialize handshake.
After `update`, the newly added `build_monthly_digest` (API repo) and `RenderAgingSummary` (local repo) symbols became searchable through the documented commands.

blockers.description: Local-mode indexing of the copied benchmark repos for the standard 17-task eval subset was killed by the OS before any `.vera/` index was created, preventing a successful full-surface Recall@5 measurement.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried flask indexing with `taskset -c 0` plus `OMP_NUM_THREADS=1`, `ORT_NUM_THREADS=1`, and `RAYON_NUM_THREADS=1`; the process was still killed (exit 137).
